prompt: Trap: shallow pressure can force fold, choose fold.
why_v1: Fold protects chips when stack depth and price do not support continuing.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Fold fits because this short-stack trap is too dangerous to defend without a stronger hand.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold is better when shallow-stack pressure makes continuing too expensive, because preserving chips matters more than chasing a thin continue.
